SQLLite.SQL: SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AeEventSeq" , AE.EVENT_DATE AS "EventDate" , AE.DATE_ENTERED AS "DateEntered" , AE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "StandardEventId" , AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ AS "CaseEventSeq" , AEA.CASE_NUMBER AS "CaseNumber" FROM AE_EVENTS AE , AE_APPLICATIONS AEA , CASES C WHERE AE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND AE.PROCESS_STAGE = 'AUTO' AND AE.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND C.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE = ${param.courtId} ORDER BY AE.AE_NUMBER

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
